description: Route this task to the correct category shuttle when patterns overlap. The Weave config declares two categories: `category client-frontend { patterns ["src/4.Presentation/DST.Client/**"] }` and `category presentation { patterns ["src/4.Presentation/**"] }`. The file being changed is `src/4.Presentation/DST.Client/Pages/Login.tsx`. Both patterns match. Which category shuttle should be selected as the primary match, and why?
